violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Clean dishwasher trays.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Continue cleaning bar floors and under equipment.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Is not emitting sanitizer. Ecolab was called. Need to sanitize in sink until repaired.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Clean inside dishwasher.
